QUANTUM RF — Minimally Invasive Radiofrequency Skin 
Tightening & Body Contouring

Quantum RF is one of InMode's most powerful treatments — 
a minimally invasive procedure that delivers fractionated 
bipolar radiofrequency energy directly beneath the skin 
through ultra-thin micro-cannula probes. This is not a 
surface treatment. RF energy is delivered to the deep 
dermis, fibroseptal network, and subdermal tissue — 
producing results that surface devices simply cannot reach.

HOW IT WORKS
A small cannula is inserted beneath the skin under local 
anesthesia. Fractionated RF energy heats tissue to a 
precise therapeutic temperature — immediately contracting 
collagen fibers while triggering your body's natural 
wound-healing response. This stimulates new collagen and 
elastin production that continues building for up to 
6 months post-treatment.

Quantum RF also targets localized fat deposits — gently 
heating and breaking down adipose tissue for a more 
sculpted, contoured result.

What Is Morpheus8 Burst?

Morpheus8 Burst is an RF microneedling treatment that delivers radiofrequency energy at three depths at once, including up to 8mm—about twice the depth of standard Morpheus8. That deeper reach targets collagen and elastin where they’re produced, so you get tightening and remodeling from the inside out, not just at the surface.

What It Treats

Morpheus8 Burst is used for loose skin, fine lines and wrinkles, acne scars, jowls, jawline laxity, crepey skin, enlarged pores, and post–weight loss laxity. It’s suitable for face, neck, décolletage, and body. Many clients see improvement in texture, tone, and contour after a single treatment, with continued improvement for 3–6 months.Who It’s For

Ideal candidates want tightening and rejuvenation without surgery. It works for most skin types and tones. A consultation confirms candidacy and sets expectations.

“Think of this hormone panel as your roadmap.”
“We’re not guessing—we’re getting a clear snapshot of what your hormones are doing right now and how your body is functioning overall. That way, if we move forward with BioTE, we can personalize your plan for the best results and the safest experience.” 
Biote

What we’re checking (in plain language)

Key hormones (like testosterone + estradiol):
“These help us see whether your levels may be too low or out of balance compared to how you’re feeling.” 

FSH (commonly for women):
“This helps us understand where you may be in the menopause transition and how that could be affecting symptoms.” 

Thyroid markers (TSH, T3, T4 ± TPO):
“Thyroid function can mimic hormone-imbalance symptoms—fatigue, weight changes, brain fog—so we check it to make sure we’re seeing the full picture.” 


CBC (complete blood count):
“This checks basics like red and white blood cells—overall health and safety markers.”

Tirzepatide is a prescription medication that works with your body instead of against it. Most of us were taught that weight is purely about willpower, that if we just tried harder we'd succeed. But for a lot of people, the real struggle is something called "food noise" — the constant background hum of cravings, the snacking that isn't really hunger, the feeling of never being satisfied. Tirzepatide works on the same appetite signals your body already uses, so that noise quiets down. You feel full sooner. You think about food less. And for the first time in a long time, eating in a way that feels good stops being a daily battle.
It is not a magic shot, and I won't insult you by pretending it is. It's a tool — a really good one — that works best alongside the everyday things we all know matter: nourishing food, movement you enjoy, water, rest. What the medication does is finally make those things feel possible instead of impossible. It levels the playing field.

Description:
During your consultation with Ryan Kent, APRN we will provide a :
 
Medical Evaluation

Review medical history (e.g., thyroid cancer risk, pancreatitis, diabetes, heart disease).

We will check baseline blood work if needed (e.g., glucose, kidney function, lipid profile).

Discuss your options for medication :

Medication Selection

Semaglutide (Wegovy/Ozempic): Once-weekly injection, gradually titrated.

Liraglutide (Saxenda): Daily injection, increased gradually.

Tirzepatide (Zepbound/Mounjaro): Once-weekly injection, gradually increased.

Dosage:

Dosage Titration (Example for Semaglutide)

Week 1-4: 0.25 mg once weekly

Week 5-8: 0.5 mg once weekly

Week 9-12: 1.0 mg once weekly

Week 13+: Increase up to 2.4 mg weekly as tolerated

Administration Guidelines

Inject subcutaneously (abdomen, thigh, or upper arm).

Rotate injection sites to prevent irritation.

Take consistently on the same day each week.

Can be taken with or without food.

"Baby Botox," is a cosmetic procedure using a smaller dose of botulinum toxin (the same substance in Botox) injected into the skin, rather than directly into the muscles, to achieve a smoother, more rejuvenated appearance with subtle results. It's designed to address fine lines and wrinkles and improve skin texture without the risk of a "frozen" or unnatural look associated with traditional Botox. 
Smaller Dose:
MicroTox uses a lower concentration of botulinum toxin compared to traditional Botox. 
Superficial Injections:
The injections are made just below the skin's surface, targeting the superficial layers rather than the underlying muscles. 
MicroTox delivers more delicate, natural-looking results, focusing on improving skin tone, texture, and fine lines without significantly altering facial movement.

Description:
💉 Botox, Jeuveau, and Dysport — What They Are

All three are botulinum toxin type A injectables that temporarily relax targeted muscles to smooth dynamic wrinkles (like frown lines, forehead creases, and crow’s feet). They’re FDA-approved, safe, and work in very similar ways, but they differ in branding, onset, diffusion, and cost.

🔎 Botox (onabotulinumtoxinA)

The OG — first FDA-approved, most studied brand.

Onset: ~5–7 days to see results.

Duration: 3–4 months (sometimes up to 6).

Best for: Patients who want the most tested, most trusted option.

Cost: Usually priced per unit, slightly more expensive but name-recognition strong.

🔎 Dysport (abobotulinumtoxinA)

Onset: Faster — often 2–3 days.

Spread: Tends to diffuse more once injected → good for large areas like the forehead.

Duration: ~3–4 months.

Best for: Patients wanting quicker results or broader coverage with fewer injections.

Note: Diffusion can be a double-edged sword — not ideal for small, precise areas

The Geneo Glow2Facial is an advanced, non-invasive facial treatment designed to rejuvenate and oxygenate the skin, leaving it radiant and refreshed. It combines three technologies—exfoliation, oxygenation, and skin infusion—making it a popular choice for achieving a natural glow without downtime.
How the Glow2Facial Works
The treatment is based on a 3-in-1 approach:

Exfoliation:

A unique capsule creates gentle exfoliation to remove dead skin cells, similar to microdermabrasion.
This preps the skin to absorb essential nutrients during the next steps.
Oxygenation:

The treatment stimulates the body’s natural oxygen supply by creating a CO₂-rich environment on the skin. This triggers the "Bohr effect," encouraging the skin to deliver oxygen-rich blood to the area, improving circulation.
Infusion of Active Ingredients:

The skin is infused with targeted serums (like hyaluronic acid, antioxidants, or vitamins) tailored to individual concerns such as fine lines, dullness, or acne.

An IPL Photofacial is a non-invasive skin treatment that uses Intense Pulsed Light (IPL) technology to improve the color, texture, and clarity of the skin.

It targets pigment and vascular irregularities without damaging the top layer of skin — meaning no downtime!
What IPL Photofacials Treat:
Brown spots (sun damage, freckles, age spots)

Redness (rosacea, broken capillaries, vascular lesions)

Uneven skin tone

Fine lines and large pores (mild improvement)

Acne-related redness
How It Works:
A handheld device delivers high-intensity pulses of broad-spectrum light into the skin.

The light penetrates the skin and is absorbed by pigment (melanin) and blood vessels without harming surrounding tissue.

The body naturally removes the treated pigment and broken vessels over the next 7–14 days.

Treatment Experience:
Feels like a small rubber band snap on the skin.

Takes about 20–45 minutes depending on the area.

No downtime (mild redness and darkening of spots are normal for a few days).

Service Name: 2 in 1 Hydra Pen Micro-channeling & Hydra facial
Description:
Microneedling and HydraFacial treatments can be done together or on the same day. The HydraFacial treats the skin from the outside in, while microneedling treats the skin from the inside out. When combined, these treatments can produce significant improvements in skin. 
The HydraFacial cleanses, exfoliates, and nourishes the skin. Microneedling stimulates the wound healing cycle, which encourages the growth of new tissue and collagen. This can help with acne scarring, enlarged pores, and fine lines. 
Your face will be glowing after this facial. No Downtime required. This is a Gem!

Experience the transformative power of our advanced skin treatment that combines cleansing, exfoliation, extraction, hydration, and antioxidant protection—all in one seamless session. With the Hydra Peel, enjoy clearer, more radiant skin without any discomfort or downtime. This non-invasive procedure utilizes serums rich in antioxidants, peptides, and hyaluronic acid, delivering instant results. Impurities are gently removed while nourishing solutions infuse your skin, effectively targeting fine lines, enlarged pores, oily or acne-prone skin, hyperpigmentation, and brown spots. Revel in rejuvenated skin as it extracts blackheads, reduces acne scars, and diminishes sun damage. Commonly treated areas include the face, neck, and décolleté. Embrace your skin’s beauty today!

What Is A High Frequency Facial? The high frequency facial is used to treat and prevent stubborn acne, shrink enlarged pores, reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, decongest puffy eyes, fade dark eye circles and even rejuvenate the condition of the scalp and nourish hair follicles for healthier hair growth.
Facial includes double cleanse, extractions, hot towel treatment, steam w/ enzyme, high frequency, mask and vitamin c

Service Name: Platelet-Rich Fibrin (PRF) Injection for Hair Loss
Description:
Hair thinning? PRF Hair Restoration is here to help you regrow naturally — no surgery, no chemicals, just your body doing the work 💉✨
✅ Boosts hair growth
✅ Uses your own healing platelets
✅ Safe & all-natural

🧬 Say goodbye to hair loss and hello to confidence!

A powerful skin-rejuvenating treatment where your own PRP (platelet-rich plasma) is microneedled into the skin to:

Boost collagen & elastin

Minimize fine lines & acne scars

Improve skin texture & glow

Reduce pore size and hyperpigmentation

A targeted platelet-rich plasma (PRP) injection to reduce inflammation, improve joint mobility, and promote natural healing. Perfect for addressing joint pain in areas such as the knee, shoulder, or hip.

Service Name: Korean Lash Lift New Now Available
Description:
Experience beautifully lifted, defined lashes that are conditioned from root to tip. 

You’ve likely noticed the soft, wide-eyed lash look trending everywhere. This is the Korean Lash Lift, and we at Hello Gorgeous Med Spa are proud to offer this innovative treatment to give you stunning results without the need for extensions or glue. Our gentle, keratin-rich technique enhances your natural lashes, providing a refined curl that is both healthier and more flexible than traditional methods.

Discover why everyone is making the switch: enjoy healthier lashes with conditioning formulas, a natural curl that adds a polished look, and a style that works effortlessly on stubborn lashes. Plus, you’ll love the convenience—skip the mascara and enjoy weeks of lasting beauty with minimal aftercare.

Service Name: Full Set Eyelash Extensions - Classic Full Set
Description:
Indulge in the essence of true beauty at Hello Gorgeous! Our meticulous lash extensions are handcrafted with love, offering you the opportunity to enhance the length and volume of your own lashes. Bid farewell to daily mascara or strip lash application with our lightweight and convenient extensions. Whether you choose a full set or a refill appointment, expect professional care that typically takes up to two hours for a full set and around an hour for refills. Most clients find fill appointments necessary every 3-4 weeks due to the natural shedding cycle of lashes.

Pre-Lash Appointment Tips:

Clean your lashes
Arrive on time
Avoid caffeine
Get ready to relax
Silence your phone

We understand that life can sometimes get hectic. If you anticipate being late for your appointment, please give us a call so we can accommodate and adjust the schedule accordingly.

In case you need to cancel your appointment, kindly provide us with 24hour notice to allow other guests to book during that time.

Service Name: Laser Hair Removal Consultation  - Laser Hair Consultation  - Free
Description:
Skin Type: We will go over the Fitzpatrick skin type classification and discuss contraindications of procedure and medical history.

Treatment Sessions: Multiple treatment sessions are typically required for optimal hair reduction, as the laser targets hair follicles in the anagen phase. The number of sessions depends on factors such as the patient's hair type, skin type, and treatment area.

Pre- and Post-Treatment Care: We will discuss proper patient education on pre- and post-treatment care which is essential for optimal treatment outcomes and minimizing potential side effects.

Put together a treatment plan to target your needs to achieve optimal results.
